title: EPC Project Engineer (Civil/Design)
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a Civil/Design Engineer to join our dynamic team in overseeing and contributing to the civil engineering aspects of our renewable energy and energy storage projects. This role involves collaboration with Civil & Structural (C&S) consultants, ensuring compliance with local regulations, and the seamless execution of engineering designs and construction processes. As part of a growing company in the renewable energy sector, you will have the opportunity to work on innovative projects that have a real impact on sustainability.

Key Responsibilities:

· Liaison with Consultants:
Collaborate with Civil & Structural (C&S) consultants to develop structural schemes and perform engineering analyses, ensuring that designs meet project requirements and industry standards, while contributing to the timely completion of projects.

· Civil Design Work:
Participate in the design and development of civil engineering aspects for the renewable energy and energy storage projects, such as infrastructure, drainage, site preparation, and earthworks.

· Project Oversight:
Oversee the design and implementation of civil engineering elements of projects, ensuring compliance with industry standards, BCA regulations, and SCDF safety requirements.

· Coordination and Communication:
Act as a key point of contact for clients, internal teams, and relevant authorities, coordinating between multiple stakeholders to ensure smooth project execution and effective communication on project timelines, milestones, and deliverables.

· Project Meetings & Site Coordination:
Attend and contribute to project meetings and site visits, providing technical input and identifying solutions to engineering challenges, ensuring work is completed as planned and to a high standard of quality.

· Compliance and Safety:
Ensure that construction processes, site activities, and safety protocols align with local regulations and company standards, promoting a culture of safety across all stages of project development.

· Technical Documentation:
Prepare and review technical documentation, including drawings, reports, and specifications, to ensure accuracy and compliance with project requirements.

Requirements:

· Education:
Minimum ITE/Diploma/Higher Certificate in Civil Engineering or a related field.

· Experience:
At least 2 years of working experience in civil/structural design or a consultancy company within the construction or engineering sector, with preference for experience in renewable energy or related projects.

· Knowledge of Regulations:
Familiarity with construction processes, local regulations, BCA, SCDF, and safety requirements.

· Additional Qualifications:
Possession of a Specialist Diploma in Construction Productivity (SDCP) is a plus.

· Software Skills:
Proficient in Microsoft Office applications and civil engineering software/tools (e.g., AutoCAD, Revit, Civil 3D).

· Problem-Solving Skills:
Strong analytical, problem-solving skills with the ability to work independently and in collaboration with diverse teams.

· Language Requirements:
Fluent in both English and Mandarin (spoken and written) to liaise with colleagues, clients, suppliers, and vendors in Singapore and China.

· Travel Flexibility:
Willingness to travel overseas (including China and project sites in Asia) for training or project requirements.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
